title: Blackstone Credit Acquires 49% Interest in U.S. East Coast LNG Infrastructure Asset
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Blackstone Credit has acquired EIG's 49% ownership interest in Elba Liquefaction Company (“ELC”), a joint venture entity of the Elba Island LNG facility. Kinder Morgan (NYSE: KMI) will remain as the operator and retain its 51% ownership of ELC. ELC is an LNG liquefaction facility located near Savannah, Georgia.
